videos.headline: Washington fans storm field after Oregon's game-tying attempt misses
videos.description: Oregon misses a game-tying field goal attempt to seal the 36-33 victory for Washington.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Washington storms field after Oregon's game-tying FG attempt just misses) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michael Penix Jr. finds Giles Jackson for opening Washington TD
videos.description: Washington takes a 7-0 lead over Oregon on Michael Penix Jr.'s 26-yard touchdown pass.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michael Penix Jr. finds Giles Jackson for opening Washington TD) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon responds with TD, 2-point conversion to take lead
videos.description: Bucky Irving rushes in for a touchdown and Patrick Herbert keeps it himself for a two-point conversion.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon responds with TD, 2-point conversion to take lead) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michael Penix Jr. delivers dime for his 2nd TD pass of game
videos.description: Michael Penix Jr. throws a great pass to Ja'Lynn Polk as Washington retakes the lead over Oregon.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michael Penix Jr. delivers dime for his 2nd TD pass of game) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Patrick Herbert makes a great catch for an Oregon TD
videos.description: Bo Nix rolls out and delivers a great pass to Patrick Herbert for an Oregon touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Patrick Herbert makes a great catch for an Oregon TD) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Washington scores TD and tacks on unusual 2-point conversion
videos.description: Dillon Johnson rushes in for the 8-yard touchdown, and Washington lines up in an unorthodox formation for the 2-point conversion.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Washington scores TD and tacks on unusual 2-point conversion) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon's D capitalizes on mistake with INT off Michael Penix Jr.
videos.description: Jahlil Florence makes a nice interception off Michael Penix Jr. to give Oregon the ball back.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon's D capitalizes on mistake with INT off Michael Penix Jr.) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michael Penix Jr. slings 3rd TD to boost Washington's lead
videos.description: Michael Penix Jr. throws a touchdown to Rome Odunze to give Washington a bigger lead over Oregon.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michael Penix Jr. slings 3rd TD to boost Washington's lead) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Troy Franklin III hauls in 30-yard Oregon TD
videos.description: Bo Nix connects with Troy Franklin III for a touchdown and adds on a two-point conversion after.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Troy Franklin III hauls in 30-yard Oregon TD) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan James fights his way in for 10-yard Oregon TD
videos.description: Jordan James breaks out of a couple of tackles and finds the end zone for an Oregon touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan James fights his way in for 10-yard Oregon TD) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon's D comes up huge on 4th-down stop on goal line
videos.description: Washington fails to convert on fourth-down and Oregon gets the ball back on the goal line.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon's D comes up huge on 4th-down stop on goal line) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon's 4th-down fail sets up go-ahead Washington TD
videos.description: After a failed 4th down from Oregon, Michael Penix Jr. throws a touchdown to Rome Odunze to give Washington the lead with under two minutes remaining.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon's 4th-down fail sets up go-ahead Washington TD) 2023/10/14 ESHEET
